description: You are a SOC analyst at an e-commerce company. Extend Wazuh's detection capabilities to identify web application attacks in Nginx access logs. Create a custom log decoder that extracts the requested URL, HTTP method, response code, and source IP into the local custom decoder file. Implement three custom rules targeting SQL injection (level 10+), path/directory traversal (level 10+), and command injection (level 9+), ensuring at least one rule includes a MITRE ATT&CK technique mapping. All changes must be persistent in the Wazuh configuration files on disk. Dashboard login: admin/SecretPassword at https://localhost (accept SSL certificate warning). API credentials: wazuh-wui/MyS3cr37P450r.*- at https://localhost:55000.

metadata.description: Create nginx decoder and web attack detection rules with MITRE ATT&CK mapping
